LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF JAFF LIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE: PLAINTIFF'S COMMISSION OF A NUISANCE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER COMPLYING WITH CCP 437C(G). PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE, REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD, CSR# 11055

MOTION By Plaintiff For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Ronald D. Schivo, Esq., L.O. of Andrew Saks, 956-8100, for Plaintiff and moving party Jaff Lin.
*No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF JAFF LIN'S MOTION By Plaintiff For Award Of Attorney'S Fees - Granted, no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301/JU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ronald D. Schivo, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF ANDREW M. ZACKS 956-8100, for plaintiff Jaff Lin, moving for summary judgment
Ashley St. George, Esq. of SERRA, LICHTER 986-5591, specially appearing for defendant and opposing party
* The Court ordered attorney St. George to file the Substitution of Attorney today so she can appear generally for the defendant in this hearing.
* A R G U E D and the Court GRANTED PLAINTIFF JAFF LIN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
No triable issue of fact re: plaintiff's commission of a nuisance. Prevailing party is to prepare an order complying with CCP 437c(g). Plaintiff submitted a proposed order for the Court's signature. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR 11055

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Continued To Nov-20-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Ronald D. Schivo, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF ANDREW M. ZACKS 956-8100, for plaintiff Jaff Lin moving for summary judgment
John Turner appearing in propria persona 503-0695, opposing party
The Court C O N T I N U E D the hearing to November 20, 2002 at 9:30 a.m., defendant's
opposition due on 11/18 by 9am (service to be done either by fax/personal delivery), plaintiff's reply due on the morning of the hearing. (JJM/301/DR) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855
